headline: 3 Value Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: Value investing has produced some of the world’s most famous investing billionaires, including Warren Buffett, David Einhorn, and Seth Klarman, who built their fortunes by purchasing wonderful businesses at reasonable prices. But these hidden gems are few and far between - many stocks that appear cheap often stay that way because they face structural issues.

headline: NTCSA Signs Helicopter Purchase Agreement with Textron Inc. (TXT)
summary: Textron Inc. (NYSE:TXT) is among the 8 Best Drone Stocks to Buy for the Next 3 Years. On March 12, the company said that the National Transmission Company South Africa (NTCSA) had signed a purchase agreement for seven Bell 407GXis. The announcement came during the VAI Verticon 2026. The helicopters are expected to be used for […]
